creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #2)
Hi danfe,
I am sorry but I might have missed this reply. My first try would be to disable the option CDROM_DMA of qemu and rebuild it. Then retry.

Second option would be adding the hdd as SCSI rather than ATA. This is definitely a problem attached with either ATA or ATAPI.

In the earlier days we could do hw.ata.ata*_dma=0 which is no longer available.

dmesg would be highly helpful.
